# LogicalNeuroVol { #neuroim.LogicalNeuroVol }

```python
LogicalNeuroVol(data, space, label='', indices=None)
```

Logical/binary 3D neuroimaging volume.
Extends DenseNeuroVol with boolean data.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name    | Type                                           | Description                                         | Default    |
|---------|------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------|------------|
| data    | [array](`array`) - [like](`like`)              | Boolean 3D array                                    | _required_ |
| space   | [NeuroSpace](`neuroim.neuro_space.NeuroSpace`) | Spatial metadata                                    | _required_ |
| label   | [str](`str`)                                   | Volume label                                        | `''`       |
| indices | [array](`array`) - [like](`like`)              | If provided, only these indices will be set to True | `None`     |

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [sum](#neuroim.LogicalNeuroVol.sum) | Number of True voxels. |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [as_logical](#neuroim.LogicalNeuroVol.as_logical) | Already logical, return self. |

### as_logical { #neuroim.LogicalNeuroVol.as_logical }

```python
LogicalNeuroVol.as_logical()
```

Already logical, return self.
